pages.text: A Cane Sword is essentially a Cane with a Sword hidden inside of it, used by $(l:observations/vampirism)Vampires$(/l) to further their dual nature: normal on the outside and a monster within. A Cane Sword contains a small reservoir that will collect the blood of any suitable victim, that can be consumed by the vampire when needed.

pages.title: Using the Sword
pages.text: Sneak-use the Cane to draw the sword. When deployed, it behaves just like a mundane Sword. Sneak-use the drawn Sword to sheathe it. A sheathed Cane Sword will only deal very little damage.$(br)To consume any collected blood, use the Cane Sword when it's sheathed.$(br)The Sword can be repaired with $(item)Diamonds$().
